claim: The manuscript uses a combination of substitution and transposition ciphers in the biological section.
evidence_for: Biological section has higher entropy levels compared to other sections
evidence_against: No clear evidence of transposition patterns
test: Compute the frequency of consecutive words with identical glyphs in different positions
test_metric: Frequency of consecutive word pairs with identical glyphs
